name: Alexandria Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Alexandria Recreation Center in Alexandria, LA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Ward 10 Recreational Complex
description: Ward 10 Recreational Complex is a place to play pickleball in Ball, LA. There are 12 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.
